allow: Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('server.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('server.py: syntax OK'\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8002/api/admin/import-database' -Method POST -ErrorAction Stop; "import-database -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "import-database -> $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8002/api/admin/import-users' -Method POST -ErrorAction Stop; "import-users -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "import-users -> $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell($urls = @\('/api/admin/import-database','/api/admin/import-users','/api/admin/import-documents'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri \("http://localhost:8002" + $u\) -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $code = if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ } else { 'no-response' }; "$u -> $code" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $urls = @\('/api/admin/import-database','/api/admin/import-users','/api/admin/import-documents'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri \("http://localhost:8002" + $u\) -Method POST -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; "$u -> 200" } catch { $code = if \($_.Exception.Response\) { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } else { 'no-response' }; "$u -> $code" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8002/api/admin/import-database' -Method POST -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; '200' } catch { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8002/api/admin/import-database' -Method POST -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; 'OK 200' } catch { "code=$\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\) msg=$\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8002/api/admin/import-database' -Method POST -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; '200' } catch { [int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8002/api/admin/import-database' -Method POST -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; 'OK 200' } catch { "code=$\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })
